must_surface.rationale: The fixture is a well-formed Phase I BDA. The merged T-Box + fixture must be consistent. If reasoner reports inconsistency or the individual is unsatisfiable, the T-Box has overconstrained Phase1BattleDamageAssessment — eliminating valid real-world instances.

Asserted directly. Once JI-005 introduces EquivalentTo definitions for Phase1BDA, this expectation extends to from-properties classification (drop the asserted type, expect inference from inputs/outputs/participants).
